name: Eggplant with Spicy Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: 4 Oriental eggplants should equal about 1 lb.
2. Cook ground pork with half ground beef and half ground pork if desired.
3. Use the green part of green onion only.
4. Trim blossom ends of eggplants. Cut in halves lengthwise. Cut each half into 1/2-inch-thick diagonal slices.
5. Steam eggplants until tender or cook in 1 inch hot oil in a large skillet or wok until golden brown. Drain well on paper towels.
6. Add chile oil to the hot oil in the skillet, cooking for 30 seconds.
7. Add garlic and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
8. Add ground pork, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, broth, and hoisin sauce to the skillet. Stir-fry until the pork is browned.
9. Add vinegar and eggplants, tossing lightly to blend flavors and heat through. Season with more soy sauce if needed.
10. Mix cornstarch with water and stir into the pork mixture. Cook until ingredients glisten.
11. Add green onion and stir-fry for 5 seconds. Serve immediately.
